text.title: Spec-Driven Debugging Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: use observability methodology to capture repro first

branch.question: Is writing a failing test cheaper than the fix?

conclusion.verdict: skip; fix directly with manual verification

branch.question: Is the bug a regression (worked before)?

conclusion.verdict: git bisect with failing spec as oracle
write failing spec; minimise repro; fix while red→green

text.example: Worked path from root-question to conclusion.
